name: Cygnus X-1
local_fluid_medium: Dense stellar wind environment
observed_jets: Yes, highly powerful, continuous polar jets deflected by the companion's stellar wind (5.2-degree bend).

primary_observational_sources.reference: Prabu, S. et al. (2026). A jet bent by a stellar wind in the black hole X-ray binary Cygnus X-1. Nature Astronomy.
